title: Kitchen Perfected Electric Stand Mixer with Bowl, 2L, 300W, Tilting Stand and Whisks and Dough Hooks, 5-Speed Hand Mixer with Turbo Function - E5434WH
features: 2 IN 1 ELECTRONIC MIXER WITH ROTATING BOWL - use as a conventional hand-held mixer for mixing cakes, batter, egg whites and kneading dough or pop it on the stand and the rotating bowl and twin whisks thoroughly mix all the ingredients

5 SPEED SETTINGS - use the lower settings to start off mixing and for making dough or folding in dry ingredients, speeds 3 and 4 for making batters, cake mixes, frostings and buttercream and the high speeds for whipping cream and beating eggs
EASY ACCESS TO BOWL - when the mixer is on the stand you can tilt the head to easily change the attachments or for convenient access to add extra ingredients into your mixture or to remove the bowl
SIMPLE TO CLEAN - the bowl is easy to wash up, the mixer and stand wipe clean easily and the dishwasher safe dough hooks and twin whisks remove at the touch of a button to go in the dishwasher
description: The KitchenPerfected 300w Stand Mixer/Whisk is perfect for all of your baking needs. With 5 speed settings, you are able to choose a suitable setting and the turbo button provides a quick burst of speed to beat ingredients smoothly. 2 beater and 2 hook attachments make light work of mixing your ingredients together. The beaters can be used to mix things such as light cake mixtures, batters and creaming ingredients, and the hook attachments are perfect for dough and heavier cake mixtures. To remove one set of attachments so you can use the others, simply press the eject button. A powerful 300w engine makes light work of all your mixing. When the mixer is on the stand you can tilt the head to easily change the attachments or for convenient access to add extra ingredients into your mixture or to remove the bowl. The bowl automatically rotates ensure an even mixture. Box Includes: 1 The KitchenPerfected 300w Hand Whisk Mixing Bowl Stand 2x Whisk Beaters 2x Dough Hooks Instruction Manual
